name: ci-metrics
tagline: Queries PyTorch CI, GitHub Actions, Grafana, and infra metrics through a checksum-verified wrapper script.
verdict: Well-built integration skill: declares tool requirements up front, checks gh auth, downloads a pinned/checksum-verified binary into a private cache, and uses a read-only Grafana token for its own stated purpose. No security issues found. Lacks scope exclusions and a version/changelog signal.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' or scope-exclusion text, despite covering a broad set of CI/infra topics (Grafana, GH Actions, HUD, runner health).
No version field, changelog, or dated revision notes anywhere in the file.
